questions.q: When writing a Role manifest to grant permissions to manage Deployments, what should you set the `apiGroups` field to?
questions.explanation: Deployments, ReplicaSets, DaemonSets, and StatefulSets all belong to the `apps` API group (e.g., `apps/v1`). Therefore, in the RBAC Role, `apiGroups` must be `["apps"]`.

questions.q: You completely forget the API group for NetworkPolicies during an exam. What command can you run to find it?
questions.explanation: `kubectl api-resources` is your built-in cheat sheet. It prints a table of every resource type the cluster supports, including its short name, whether it is namespaced, and its API group.
